case_title: KEVIN GREEN VS. MARK FEATHERS, ET AL.

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF GREEN, KEVIN

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANTS MARK FEATHERS, AND, INVESTORS PRIME FUND, LLC DEMURRER. NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEMURRER SUSTAINED WITH TEN DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND. PLAINTIFF MAY CLARIFY THE ALLEGATIONS AGAINST EACH DEFENDANT, AND, AS TO THE FRAUD CLAIM, MUST PLEAD THE ELEMENTS OF FRAUD WITH PARTICULARITY. PLAINTIFF MAY ADD A NEW DEFENDANT. DEFENDANTS' OBJECTIONS TO THAT AMENDMENT MAY BE RAISED SEPARATELY ONCE THE AMENDED COMPLAINT IS FILED. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER.) JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD, REPORTER: KENT GUBBINE, CSR #5797

DEMURRER
Off Calendar Jan-28-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANTS MARK FEATHERS, and, INVESTORS PRIME FUND, LLC DEMURRER. No appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Demurrer sustained with ten days leave to amend. Plaintiff may clarify the allegations against each defendant, and, as to the fraud claim, must plead the elements of fraud with particularity. Plaintiff may add a new defendant. Defendants' objections to that amendment may be raised separately once the amended complaint is filed. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) (302/CWW)Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Court Reporter: Kent Gubbine CSR 5797
